g.title: leaderContract
g.text:
<<core interface>>
LeaderElector
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ runAsyncIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderState

g.title: suspendContract
g.text:
<<core suspend interface>>
SuspendLeaderElector
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ runIfLeaderResultSuspend(slot)
coroutine context handle

g.title: groupContract
g.text:
<<core group interface>>
LeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ activeCount / availableSlots

g.title: suspendGroupContract
g.text:
<<core suspend group>>
SuspendLeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderGroupState

g.title: redissonLeader
g.text:
<<blocking + async implementation>>
RedissonLeaderElector
RedissonClient.getLock(lockName)
tryLock(wait, explicit lease)
built-in watchdog disabled
LeaderLeaseAutoExtender owns renewals

g.title: singleDelegates
g.text:
<<RLock renewal delegates>>
Single Extend Delegates
RedissonLockExtendDelegate
RedissonSuspendLockExtendDelegate
RKeys.expire renews lock key
WrongThread on owner mismatch

g.title: redissonSuspend
g.text:
<<coroutine implementation>>
RedissonSuspendLeaderElector
uses RLock async API
PID-seeded owner id
withContext(handle element)
NonCancellable unlock

g.title: ownerId
g.text:
<<RLock owner identity>>
Coroutine Owner ID
timestamp | pid%(2^10) | seq
generated per runIfLeader call
prevents coroutine false reentry
zero Redis round-trip

g.title: permitDelegates
g.text:
<<semaphore renewal delegates>>
Permit Extend Delegates
RedissonSemaphoreExtendDelegate
RedissonSuspendSemaphoreExtendDelegate
updateLeaseTime by permitId
active flag tracks failed extend

g.title: semaphore
g.text:
<<group permit primitive>>
RPermitExpirableSemaphore
key: lg:{lockName}
trySetPermits idempotent
tryAcquire returns permitId
updateLeaseTime delegates minLease

g.title: rlock
g.text:
<<single Redis lock primitive>>
Redisson RLock Path
RLock.tryLock(wait, lease, id)
RLock.unlock / unlockAsync(id)
RKeys.expire for minLease/extend
built-in watchdog never used

g.title: runtime
g.text:
<<Redis-backed objects>>
Redisson Runtime Objects
single RLock key: lockName
group semaphore: lg:{lockName}
audit RMap: lg:{lockName}:audit
permit TTL gives crash recovery

g.title: audit
g.text:
<<traceability side channel>>
LeaderSlot Audit Map
RMap<String,String>
fastPut permitId -> leaderId
expire lease + 5s padding
fastRemove on release

g.title: classifier
g.text:
<<watchdog error policy>>
RedissonBackendErrorClassifier
RedisTimeout -> transient
RedisConnection -> transient
other RedisException -> non-transient
other errors delegated
